message:
audit: diff audit batch 467 — 28 files across HEAD~30 changes, all SOUND, 0 bugs

Diff audit of recent changes under asupersync-1qfd0:
- Source: watch.rs, doctor/mod.rs, interceptor.rs, server.rs, replay.rs,
  runtime.rs, conformance.rs (2x), remote.rs, mutex.rs, scan.rs,
  progress.rs, resolver.rs, resolve.rs, obligation_table.rs,
  watch_stream.rs, tcp/stream.rs, tag.rs, replayer.rs, multipart.rs,
  gf256.rs, protocol/mod.rs, subject.rs
- Tests: raptorq_benchmark.rs, raptorq_perf_invariants.rs,
  grpc_verification.rs, tag_tests.rs, key_tests.rs
- One minor finding flagged: StreamBody::poll_frame error not terminal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
